members.name: calibrationParameters
members.description: Dictionary containing the intrinsics and extrinsic stereo parameters for rectified/undistorted images. This includes focal point, optical center, distortion, field of view, and stereo transformation matrix.

members.name: calibrationParametersRaw
members.description: Dictionary containing the intrinsics and extrinsic stereo parameters for unrectified/distorted images. This includes focal point, optical center, distortion, field of view, and stereo transformation matrix.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ZedTOP Class wiki page
